title: MeowKit harness artifact governance metadata
description: Governance metadata applied to every harness artifact (skills, agents, rules, commands, hooks). Skills and agents carry these fields in YAML frontmatter; rules, commands, and hooks carry them as entries in .claude/harness-inventory.json. Four fields are required; context_cost and dependency metadata are optional.

owner.description: Governance domain that owns this artifact. Distinct from install-metadata.ts 'owner' (which tracks install provenance: meowkit|user|meowkit-modified). Heuristics: jira-* → jira, confluence-* → confluence, gate-*/privacy-*/secret-scrub* → security, memory* → memory, default → utility.

criticality.description: Impact of this artifact being incorrect or absent. Default seed value: medium. Hand-promote to critical/high only for safety-net artifacts (privacy-block, gate-enforcement, gate-rules, core lifecycle skills). low is an explicit later opt-down.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Default: active. Deprecated artifacts are retained for compatibility; experimental artifacts are opt-in and may change without notice.

runtime.description: Execution environment. claude-code: requires Claude Code surfaces (Agent tool, hooks). portable: pure-text convention, runnable in any LLM harness. experimental: runtime requirements undefined.

context_cost.description: Optional. Estimated token footprint when this artifact is loaded into context. Promoted from meowkit.context_cost for skills; meowkit block copy preserved for backward compatibility with skills-discovery.ts.

depends_on.description: Optional legacy alias. Flat artifact IDs this artifact requires at runtime. New metadata should use dependency_edges; inventory keeps this field compatible with pack resolution.

dependency_edges.description: Optional typed artifact edges. requires and peer are active classifications; remaining enum values are reserved for future consumers.

responsibility.description: Optional (seed + tag-on-touch; untagged is allowed and reported, not hidden). The vendor-neutral substrate responsibility this artifact primarily serves. Eleven values are the Runtime-Substrate taxonomy (repo-harness synthesis, Runtime-Substrate-rooted — NOT an Anthropic standard); gate-enforcement is the one MeowKit-specific addition (the gate layer maps only partially onto permissions + audit). Hard cap 13: a new value needs justification. `mewkit inventory --substrate` aggregates artifacts by this field; the dead-weight audit targets by responsibility, not by file.

surface.description: Optional implementation-surface cross-reference (vendor-neutral 7-surface lens). Annotates which agent surface an artifact lives on; used only as a secondary axis in the substrate view. Not seeded by default.

model.description: Required for agent frontmatter only. Must be inherit, a source model tier, or a named profile resolvable by the model taxonomy.

tools.description: Required for agent frontmatter only. Comma-delimited host tool allowlist.
